nodes.name: Sandstone shrikethrush
nodes.summary: The sandstone shrikethrush (Colluricincla woodwardi) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae. It is endemic to Australia. Alternate names for the sandstone shrikethrush include the brown-breasted shrike-thrush and sandstone thrush. References External links Explore Species: Sandstone Shrikethrush at eBird (Cornell Lab of Ornithology)
nodes.shortSummary: The sandstone shrikethrush (Colluricincla woodwardi) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae. It is endemic to Australia.

nodes.summary: Colluricincla（Colluricincla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Sandstone shrikethrush、Bower's shrikethrush、Grey shrikethrush等5种鸟类。
